agtech.heroTitle: Data, AI, and automation to produce better every cycle.
agtech.heroLead: We connect sensors, machinery, satellite imagery, and management systems so you can make evidence-based decisions across the full production cycle.
agtech.whereHeadline: Does your farm already generate data—but not better decisions yet?
agtech.whereP1: Many organizations already have yield history, applications, weather, and logistics data, but it lives in silos or spreadsheets nobody checks in time.
agtech.whereP2: At Dantex we help connect those sources, design simple prediction models, and deliver actionable insights where decisions are made: the field, planning, and leadership.
agtech.impactHeadline: What we help unlock in your farming operation.

cards.title: Daily visibility
cards.body: Dashboards that show yield, moisture, and field status without opening spreadsheets.

cards.title: Less waste
cards.body: More precise input applications based on historical data and forecasts.

cards.title: Predictable operations
cards.body: Early alerts for deviations in irrigation, logistics, or weather.

cards.title: Evidence-led strategy
cards.body: Scenario simulations to decide investments season after season.

agtech.satTitle: From satellite imagery to management decisions by zone.
agtech.satBody: We translate indices like NDVI, moisture, and soil temperature into concrete management recommendations integrated with your current systems.
agtech.solutionsTitle: Use cases we build with our clients.
agtech.solutionsL1Rest: they consolidate multi-year data to define zones and densities.
agtech.solutionsL2Rest: they combine weather, soils, and practices to anticipate outcomes.
agtech.solutionsL3Rest: real-time tracking to reduce idle time.
agtech.alliancesTitle: We work with leading cloud, data, and hardware providers in agriculture.
agtech.alliancesBody: We integrate your existing stack (ERP, field platforms, imagery providers) without forcing unnecessary migrations.
agtech.workTitle: From a concrete pilot to a platform that scales.

workSteps.title: Discovery with your team
workSteps.body: We understand available data, critical decisions, and field constraints.

workSteps.title: Measurable pilot
workSteps.body: We define a use case, a test area, and clear success metrics.

workSteps.title: Responsible scale
workSteps.body: We expand to more hectares and teams with adoption in mind.

agtech.contactTitle: Ready to explore a use case in your operation?
agtech.contactLead: Tell us briefly about your crop, region, and current challenges. An agtech-focused team responds in under 2 business days.
agtech.formIntro: Book a call with our agtech team.
agtech.regionPh: USA · Midwest, Brazil · Mato Grosso, etc.
agtech.exploreLabel: What would you like to explore?
agtech.explorePh: Tell us about your crops, hectares, current technology, and challenges you want to solve.
agtech.consent: By submitting this form you agree to be contacted by our team to schedule the next conversation.
agtech.expectTitle: What to expect on the first call.
agtech.expect1: • Quick review of your context and current technology.
agtech.expect2: • Identification of 1–2 use cases with measurable impact.
agtech.timeBody: 45 minutes to understand your operation and define a viable pilot.
